name: window-seat
prompt: Medium shot. Brunette woman in elegant dark dress sitting down at window seat. Transport interior, functional seating around her. Cool interior lighting, city glow through window. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: city-falling
prompt: Wide shot through transport window. City lights falling away below, scattered like stars. Military convoys visible as moving lights. Night sky above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: city-reflection
prompt: Close-up. Brunette woman's face in profile. City lights reflected in window beside her. Composed expression, watching. Cool interior light, warm city glow on her skin. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: watching
prompt: Close-up. Brunette woman's face, eyes forward, watching. Composed, not crying. Jaw set, eyes dry. Cool light, empty space around her. Isolation visible. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
